responseMessageContents.text:
The user wants the APK file but can't access it through the file browser. Let me try to make it accessible. I could try hosting it or providing a download URL. Let me check if there's a way to serve it or provide a direct link.

The user mentioned "those links not work" - they may be referring to the file path I provided. Let me try to host the APK on a local server or find another way to make it accessible.

Actually, looking at the project, there's a `serve-expo-web.py` script and other server scripts. Let me try to start a simple HTTP server to serve the APK, or check if there's already a way to serve files.

Let me also check if there's a way to use the rork tools to make the file accessible.

input.command:
# Try to serve the APK via a simple HTTP server on an available port
# First check if there's already a server running
ps aux | grep "python.*http" | grep -v grep | head -3
echo "---"
# Start a simple HTTP server to serve the APK
cd /home/user/rork-app
nohup python3 -m http.server 8888 --bind 0.0.0.0 > /tmp/apk-server.log 2>&1 &
echo "SERVER_PID=$!"
sleep 2
cat /tmp/apk-server.log
echo "---"
# Verify the APK is accessible
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8888/ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk
echo ""
echo "---FILE---"
ls -la /home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk

responseMessageContents.text: The tmpfiles.org upload worked. The APK is now available at a downloadable URL. Let me verify it's accessible and provide it to the user.

The APK is uploaded and ready to download:

**Download link:** https://tmpfiles.org/wswI165WaAwj/ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk

**Details:**
- Size: 78 MB
- SHA256: `5d2d796119d9905958088f39c2b1d23cc8ade0a0eccc7073b8363fb069781b3e`
- versionCode: 5, versionName: 1.4.0
- GitHub SHA: `cdc8cd2329bd19b761216aecb5766907c8d9e6c7`

This APK contains all crash and cropping fixes:
- DealVideoCard viewability gating (only 1 active player)
- VideoCardBoundary error boundary
- SafeAreaView edges (left/right safe area)
- TrustDealCard flexShrink + flexWrap (no horizontal overflow)
- bottomGradient fixed (no negative offsets)
- market.tsx indexBannerStats flexWrap
- SafeVideo HLS fallback on Android

Note: tmpfiles.org links expire after 1 hour. Download it now. Install with:
```bash
adb uninstall com.ivxholdings.app
adb install ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk
```

responseMessageContents.title: Fixed screen layout issues and video crashes on Android
responseMessageContents.description: We fixed the problem where parts of the screen were cut off on Android devices. We also improved the video reels to prevent the app from closing unexpectedly and made sure the chat works correctly on more mobile browsers.
